items.title: Exosomes from bipolar disorder patients induce mania- and depression-like behaviors in mice via shared and distinct neuroimmune signatures.
items.authors: Tongtong Yao; Liguo Li; Ya Su; Wanying Shao; Fangcheng Fan; Rui Qiu; Jinghang Liu; Shibin Xi
items.abstract: Bipolar disorder (BD) is a recurrent illness characterized by alternating episodes of mania and depression, yet the biological mechanisms underlying these oscillating states remain poorly understood. Exosomes, nanosized extracellular vesicles that mediate peripheral-central communication through transfer of molecular cargo, have emerged as important regulators of brain function and disease. To test whether patient-derived exosome preparations encode phase-specific signals, we isolated serum exosomes from BD patients experiencing manic or depressive episodes and infused them stereotaxically into the medial prefrontal cortex of mice. Behavioral assessments revealed strikingly divergent effects: mania-derived exosomes produced hyperlocomotion, reduced immobility, and heightened sociability, whereas depression-derived exosomes induced hypoactivity, anhedonia, and social withdrawal. Healthy control exosomes produced no changes, underscoring disease specificity. Despite these behavioral contrasts, both mania- and depression-derived exosomes convergently disrupted neural homeostasis, as indicated by oxidative and inflammatory imbalance, glial activation, synaptic impairments, and broad transcriptomic changes in pathways related to immune signaling, oxidative stress, and neuroplasticity. Importantly, phase-dependent patterns also emerged: mania-derived exosomes biased microglia toward a pro-inflammatory profile, whereas depression-derived exosomes favored an alternative polarization state with enrichment of metabolic and neurotrophic signaling. Pharmacological suppression of microglial activation attenuated the mania-exosome phenotype, supporting the functional involvement of M1-associated microglial activation in the mania condition. Integrative exosomal miRNA and transcriptomic analyses further identified miR-629-5p as a candidate mania-enriched cargo, and in vivo inhibition of miR-629-5p attenuated the associated behavioral and molecular abnormalities. Together, these findings show that serum-derived exosome preparations from BD patients are sufficient to induce mood-state-relevant behavioral and neurobiological changes under the experimental conditions tested, while the endogenous relevance of exosome-mediated signaling in spontaneous mood transitions remains to be established.

items.title_cn: 来自双相情感障碍患者的外泌体通过共同且独特的神经免疫特征在小鼠中诱导躁狂和抑郁样行为。
items.abstract_cn: 双相情感障碍（BD）是一种反复发作的疾病，其特征是躁狂和抑郁交替发作，但这些振荡状态背后的生物学机制仍然知之甚少。外泌体是一种纳米大小的细胞外囊泡，通过分子货物的转移介导外周-中枢通讯，已成为大脑功能和疾病的重要调节因子。为了测试患者来源的外泌体制剂是否编码相位特异性信号，我们从经历躁狂或抑郁发作的双相情感障碍患者中分离出血清外泌体，并将它们立体定位到小鼠的内侧前额皮质中。行为评估揭示了截然不同的影响：躁狂症衍生的外泌体产生过度运动、不动性减少和社交能力增强，而抑郁症衍生的外泌体则导致活动减退、快感缺失和社交退缩。健康对照外泌体没有产生任何变化，强调了疾病的特异性。尽管存在这些行为对比，躁狂症和抑郁症衍生的外泌体都会破坏神经稳态，如氧化和炎症失衡、神经胶质激活、突触损伤以及与免疫信号、氧化应激和神经可塑性相关途径的广泛转录组变化所表明的。重要的是，还出现了阶段依赖性模式：躁狂症衍生的外泌体使小胶质细胞偏向于促炎症特征，而抑郁症衍生的外泌体则偏向于代谢和神经营养信号丰富的替代极化状态。对小胶质细胞激活的药理学抑制减弱了躁狂症外泌体表型，支持 M1 相关小胶质细胞激活在躁狂症中的功能参与。综合外泌体 miRNA 和转录组分析进一步确定 miR-629-5p 是一种富含躁狂症的候选货物，并且体内抑制 miR-629-5p 减弱了相关的行为和分子异常。总之，这些发现表明，在测试的实验条件下，BD 患者的血清来源的外泌体制剂足以诱导情绪状态相关的行为和神经生物学变化，而……

items.title: From Gene Function to Precision Intervention: CRISPR/Cas9 and Stem Cell-Based Strategies as Emerging Disease-Modifying Approaches in PMOS.
items.authors: Masuma Khatun; Karolina Lundin; Timo Tuuri; Terhi Piltonen; Juha S Tapanainen; Andres Salumets
items.abstract: Polyendocrine metabolic ovarian syndrome (PMOS) is a complex endocrine-metabolic disorder affecting up to 18% of women worldwide and remains the leading cause of anovulatory infertility. Despite extensive research, current treatments primarily target symptoms, including menstrual irregularities, hyperandrogenism, and metabolic dysfunction, without addressing the underlying molecular and tissue-level disturbances. Advances in multi‑omic profiling have identified disruptions across neuroendocrine, metabolic, inflammatory, and extracellular matrix pathways, alongside genetic susceptibility at loci such as DENND1A, CYP17A1, LHCGR, FSHR, IRS1, and PPARG. However, the functional roles of many variants remain unresolved. CRISPR/Cas9 gene editing enables precise interrogation of these pathways, while stem cell-based platforms, including mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs), exosomes, and gene-edited induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs), may serve as complementary platforms for regeneration and disease modeling. Preclinical studies demonstrate that MSCs and their derivatives modulate inflammation, restore ovarian structure, and improve metabolic parameters, while iPSC-based models enable patient-specific investigation of steroidogenic and metabolic abnormalities. Translational challenges remain, including targeted delivery, off-target effects, phenotypic heterogeneity, and regulatory considerations. Integrating CRISPR‑based functional genomics with stem cell research may shift PMOS management from symptom‑focused care to targeted, mechanism‑driven interventions that could modify the course of PMOS (Graphical Abstract).
items.title_en: From Gene Function to Precision Intervention: CRISPR/Cas9 and Stem Cell-Based Strategies as Emerging Disease-Modifying Approaches in PMOS.
items.title_cn: 从基因功能到精准干预：CRISPR/Cas9 和基于干细胞的策略作为 PMOS 中新兴的疾病缓解方法。
items.abstract_cn: 多内分泌代谢卵巢综合征 (PMOS) 是一种复杂的内分泌代谢紊乱，影响全球多达 18% 的女性，并且仍然是无排卵性不孕的主要原因。尽管进行了广泛的研究，但目前的治疗主要针对症状，包括月经不调、雄激素过多症和代谢功能障碍，而没有解决潜在的分子和组织水平的紊乱。多组学分析的进展已经确定了神经内分泌、代谢、炎症和细胞外基质途径的破坏，以及 DENND1A、CYP17A1、LHCGR、FSHR、IRS1 和 PPARG 等位点的遗传易感性。然而，许多变体的功能作用仍未解决。 CRISPR/Cas9基因编辑能够精确询问这些通路，而基于干细胞的平台，包括间充质干细胞（MSC）、外泌体和基因编辑的诱导多能干细胞（iPSC），可以作为再生和疾病建模的补充平台。临床前研究表明，间充质干细胞及其衍生物可调节炎症、恢复卵巢结构并改善代谢参数，而基于 iPSC 的模型可以针对患者进行类固醇生成和代谢异常的特异性研究。转化挑战仍然存在，包括靶向递送、脱靶效应、表型异质性和监管考虑。将基于 CRISPR 的功能基因组学与干细胞研究相结合，可能会将 PMOS 管理从以症状为中心的护理转向有针对性的、机制驱动的干预措施，从而改变 PMOS 的病程（图解摘要）。

items.title: A nucleic acid labeling chemistry reveals surface DNA on exosomes.
items.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.authors: Filip Bošković; Priyanka Dutta Gupta; Jian Zhang; Yamuna Krishnan; Jack W Szostak
items.abstract: Chemical labeling of nucleic acids is essential to pinpoint the structure, localization, and function of RNA and DNA. Yet, reversible sequence-independent chemistries that can label native RNA and DNA remain poorly developed. Here, we describe Reversible Uridine Nitrilium-mediated Addition (RUNA), a reversible covalent chemistry that selectively modifies uridine and thymidine residues via N3 deprotonation and reaction with a nitrilium ion intermediate generated from an aldehyde and an isonitrile. The reaction forms a stable N3 adduct that can be quantitatively reversed by hydrolysis. By using reagents that are either membrane permeable or impermeable, we demonstrate the localization and function of DNA on exosomes. Although exosomes harbor nucleic acids, whether the latter are encapsulated in the exosome lumen or are surface-adhered is unknown. RUNA revealed that exosomes display DNA on their outer surface. The abundance of such surface DNA increases upon DNA-damage accumulation in cancer cells that are treated with a PARP inhibitor. This surface DNA drives exosome uptake by M2-polarized macrophages through scavenger receptors and triggers a shift toward an M1-like proinflammatory state. The selective labeling of surface DNA revealed an unexpected mechanism by which exosomes engage innate immune cells. RUNA is a versatile tool to analyze the nucleic acid content and functionality of extracellular vesicles in health and disease.
items.title_en: A nucleic acid labeling chemistry reveals surface DNA on exosomes.
items.title_cn: 核酸标记化学揭示了外泌体的表面 DNA。
items.abstract_cn: 核酸的化学标记对于查明 RNA 和 DNA 的结构、定位和功能至关重要。然而，能够标记天然 RNA 和 DNA 的、与序列无关的可逆化学方法仍然进展缓慢。在这里，我们描述了可逆尿苷腈介导的加成 (RUNA)，这是一种可逆共价化学，通过 N3 去质子化以及与醛和异腈生成的腈离子中间体反应，选择性地修饰尿苷和胸苷残基。该反应形成稳定的 N3 加合物，可通过水解定量逆转。通过使用膜可渗透或不可渗透的试剂，我们证明了 DNA 在外泌体上的定位和功能。尽管外泌体含有核酸，但后者是否被封装在外泌体腔内或表面粘附尚不清楚。 RUNA 揭示外泌体在其外表面展示 DNA。在用 PARP 抑制剂处理的癌细胞中，DNA 损伤积累后，这种表面 DNA 的丰度就会增加。这种表面 DNA 通过清道夫受体驱动 M2 极化巨噬细胞摄取外泌体，并引发向 M1 样促炎状态的转变。表面 DNA 的选择性标记揭示了外泌体与先天免疫细胞相互作用的意想不到的机制。 RUNA 是一种多功能工具，用于分析健康和疾病中细胞外囊泡的核酸含量和功能。

items.title: Microglial PTP1B promotes synaptic pathology and cognitive deficits in chronic Toxoplasma gondii infection.
items.authors: Daxiang Xu; Cheng He; Huiling Lv; Jensen G Weedor; Yihui Xing; Zhicheng He; Pengxue Jing; Wenjing Cui
items.abstract: Chronic infection with the neurotropic pathogen Toxoplasma gondii has been epidemiologically associated with a risk of neurodegeneration; however, the mechanisms driving infection-associated cognitive decline remain unclear. We investigated the role of microglial protein-tyrosine phosphatase 1B (PTP1B) as a potential driver of neuropathology in chronic toxoplasmosis. Using a murine model, we demonstrate that PTP1B expression is elevated in the hippocampus following infection. Global genetic ablation or pharmacological inhibition of PTP1B rescued infection-induced cognitive deficits and mitigated neuroinflammation. Crucially, microglia-specific deletion of Ptp1b prevented synaptic loss and cognitive impairment. Mechanistically, we show that microglial PTP1B potentiates the nuclear factor-kappa B (NF-κB) pathway, promoting complement component 1q (C1q)-mediated synaptic tagging and subsequent neuronal structural damage. Validating the clinical relevance of these findings, we observed significantly elevated PTP1B levels in peripheral blood mononuclear cells from T. gondii-seropositive individuals, which correlated with inflammatory markers. Overall, our findings identify microglial PTP1B as a pivotal mediator of T. gondii-associated neurodegeneration.
items.title_en: Microglial PTP1B promotes synaptic pathology and cognitive deficits in chronic Toxoplasma gondii infection.
items.title_cn: 小胶质细胞 PTP1B 促进慢性弓形虫感染的突触病理和认知缺陷。
items.abstract_cn: 流行病学上，嗜神经病原体弓形虫的慢性感染与神经变性的风险相关。然而，导致感染相关认知能力下降的机制仍不清楚。我们研究了小胶质细胞蛋白酪氨酸磷酸酶 1B (PTP1B) 作为慢性弓形虫病神经病理学潜在驱动因素的作用。使用小鼠模型，我们证明感染后海马中 PTP1B 表达升高。 PTP1B 的整体基因消融或药理抑制可挽救感染引起的认知缺陷并减轻神经炎症。至关重要的是，小胶质细胞特异性删除 Ptp1b 可防止突触丧失和认知障碍。从机制上讲，我们发现小胶质细胞 PTP1B 增强了核因子-κB (NF-κB) 通路，促进补体成分 1q (C1q) 介导的突触标记和随后的神经元结构损伤。为了验证这些发现的临床相关性，我们观察到弓形虫血清阳性个体的外周血单核细胞中 PTP1B 水平显着升高，这与炎症标志物相关。总体而言，我们的研究结果确定小胶质细胞 PTP1B 是弓形虫相关神经变性的关键介质。

items.title: Zika virus infection induces a persistent accumulation of Alzheimer's disease-like Tau phosphorylation in adult immunocompetent mice in association with memory and social behavior impairments.
items.authors: Gaetano Calcagno; Zeyni Mansuroglu; Helena Segrt; Laurine Conquet; Jose Pablo Marin-Obando; Violaine Bortolin; Fabrice de Chaumont; Luc Buée
items.abstract: Clinical and epidemiological data support the link between viral encephalitis and neurodegeneration but its causal mechanism remains mostly unknown. Zika virus (ZIKV) is an emerging, neurotropic flavivirus susceptible to induce cognitive impairments in infected adults. In this work we have analyzed the capacity of ZIKV to induce the accumulation of pathological phosphorylated Tau protein (pTau), a major driver of neurodegenerative disorders such as Alzheimer's disease, throughout the infection of adult immunocompetent mice. The capacity of ZIKV to induce pTau in vivo, was analyzed in the long term in three Collaborative Cross mouse strains displaying different responses to ZIKV. The establishment and propagation of pTau was quantified up to 60 days post-infection (dpi) in correlation with the level and localization of neuronal viral infection and of microglia activation using immunofluorescence, immunohistochemistry, wide field and confocal microscopy and gene expression analysis. Strength, coordination, memory and social behavior were evaluated before and following the establishment and progression of pTau. The role of microglia on ZIKV-induced pTau was investigated by partially depleting microglial cells using PLX3397 (PLX). ZIKV infection induced a significant accumulation of pTau starting at 15 that persisted at least until 60 dpi. At 15 dpi, pTau was observed in ZIKV-infected neurons in the CA2 and CA1 regions of the hippocampus and in non-infected cortical neurons in association with neuroinflammation and social behavior alterations. At 30 dpi, pTau progressed independently of infection and inflammation, positively correlated to PLX-susceptible Apoe gene expression in association with short-term memory defects. These results shed light on how brain viral infections, which are a major concern for public health, drive pTau accumulation and propagation in link with memory impairment and social behavior alterations laying the groundwork for potential new therapeutic treatments.
items.title_en: Zika virus infection induces a persistent accumulation of Alzheimer's disease-like Tau phosphorylation in adult immunocompetent mice in association with memory and social behavior impairments.
items.title_cn: 寨卡病毒感染会诱导成年免疫功能正常小鼠中类似阿尔茨海默氏病的 Tau 磷酸化持续积累，并与记忆和社会行为障碍相关。
items.abstract_cn: 临床和流行病学数据支持病毒性脑炎和神经退行性变之间的联系，但其因果机制仍知之甚少。寨卡病毒 (ZIKV) 是一种新兴的嗜神经性黄病毒，容易引起感染成人的认知障碍。在这项工作中，我们分析了 ZIKV 在成年免疫活性小鼠感染过程中诱导病理性磷酸化 Tau 蛋白 (pTau) 积累的能力，pTau 是阿尔茨海默病等神经退行性疾病的主要驱动因素。在三种对 ZIKV 表现出不同反应的 Collaborative Cross 小鼠品系中，对 ZIKV 在体内诱导 pTau 的能力进行了长期分析。使用免疫荧光、免疫组织化学、广​​域和共聚焦显微镜以及基因表达分析，对感染后 60 天 (dpi) 内 pTau 的建立和增殖进行量化，与神经元病毒感染和小胶质细胞激活的水平和定位相关。在 pTau 建立和进展之前和之后评估力量、协调性、记忆力和社会行为。通过使用 PLX3397 (PLX) 部分去除小胶质细胞来研究小胶质细胞对 ZIKV 诱导的 pTau 的作用。 ZIKV 感染从 15 dpi 开始诱导 pTau 显着积累，并至少持续到 60 dpi。 15 dpi 时，在海马 CA2 和 CA1 区域感染 ZIKV 的神经元以及未感染的皮质神经元中观察到 pTau，与神经炎症和社会行为改变相关。 30 dpi 时，pTau 的进展独立于感染和炎症，与与短期记忆缺陷相关的 PLX 敏感 Apoe 基因表达呈正相关。这些结果揭示了脑病毒感染如何驱动 pTau 积累和传播，从而与记忆障碍和社会行为改变相关，从而为潜在的新治疗方法奠定基础。脑病毒感染是公共卫生的一个主要问题。

items.title: Neuroinflammation in neurodegenerative diseases: pathogenic pathways and emerging pharmacotherapeutic targets in Alzheimer's and Parkinson's disease.
items.authors: Ravi Ranjan Kumar; Kamaljeet; Sourabh Kosey
items.abstract: Neuroinflammation is now widely recognized as a key contributor to the initiation and progression of neurodegenerative diseases, particularly Alzheimer's disease (AD) and Parkinson's disease (PD). Chronic activation of brain-resident immune cells, including microglia and astrocytes, in response to misfolded protein aggregates such as amyloid-β and tau in AD and α-synuclein in PD, promotes maladaptive immune signaling, sustained cytokine release, and disruption of the blood-brain barrier (BBB). This chronic brain inflammation leads to synaptic dysfunction, neuronal loss and ultimately clinical deterioration. These processes are accompanied by disease-specific factors, such as inflammation of the gut-brain axis in PD and genetic modulators including APOE4, TREM2, and LRRK2. Furthermore, the development of fluid biomarkers together with neuroimaging techniques has improved early detection and monitoring of neuroinflammation leading to personalized therapeutic approaches. Clinical trials targeting microglial phenotypes, cytokine signaling, inflammasome activity, and genetic risk factors are emerging therapeutic strategies. Model limitations and heterogeneity of patients present challenges, but insights into neuroimmune interactions could provide a path forward for disease-modifying strategies. The present review aims to summarize new knowledge about the protective and detrimental aspects of neuroinflammation in AD and PD, providing an analysis on these developing prospects for targeted interventions toward slowing or stopping neurodegeneration.
items.title_en: Neuroinflammation in neurodegenerative diseases: pathogenic pathways and emerging pharmacotherapeutic targets in Alzheimer's and Parkinson's disease.
items.title_cn: 神经退行性疾病中的神经炎症：阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病的致病途径和新兴药物治疗靶点。
items.abstract_cn: 神经炎症现在被广泛认为是神经退行性疾病，特别是阿尔茨海默病（AD）和帕金森病（PD）的发生和进展的关键因素。大脑驻留免疫细胞（包括小胶质细胞和星形胶质细胞）慢性激活，以响应错误折叠的蛋白质聚集体，例如 AD 中的淀粉样蛋白-β 和 tau 蛋白以及 PD 中的 α-突触核蛋白，促进适应不良的免疫信号传导、持续的细胞因子释放和血脑屏障 (BBB) 的破坏。这种慢性脑炎症会导致突触功能障碍、神经元丢失并最终导致临床恶化。这些过程伴随着疾病特异性因素，例如 PD 中肠脑轴的炎症以及 APOE4、TREM2 和 LRRK2 等遗传调节剂。此外，液体生物标志物的发展与神经影像技术一起改善了神经炎症的早期检测和监测，从而实现了个性化治疗方法。针对小胶质细胞表型、细胞因子信号传导、炎症小体活动和遗传危险因素的临床试验是新兴的治疗策略。模型的局限性和患者的异质性提出了挑战，但对神经免疫相互作用的深入了解可以为疾病修饰策略提供一条前进的道路。本综述旨在总结有关 AD 和 PD 中神经炎症的保护性和有害性方面的新知识，对减缓或阻止神经退行性变的针对性干预措施的发展前景进行分析。

items.title: The Wiskott-Aldrich Syndrome protein (WASp) contribution to microglial phagocytic function and neurodevelopmental support.
items.authors: Serena Seminara; Aurora Bianchi; Davide Comolli; Marco Spreafico; Wenjie Liao; Hemanta Sarmah; Grazia Iannello; Barbara Corneo
items.abstract: Myeloid progenitor cells colonize the brain during embryogenesis and differentiate in microglia. Microglia shape neuronal wiring during development and maintain brain homeostasis in adulthood, both actions requiring intact cytoskeletal functionality. The Wiskott-Aldrich syndrome protein (WASp) mediates cytoskeletal dynamics of peripheral myeloid cells, suggesting a similar role in microglia. To investigate WASp's role in microglia, we impaired WASp function in human induced pluripotent stem cells-derived microglia (iMicro) and zebrafish embryos.WASp colocalized with the actin cytoskeleton at membrane ruffles in phagocytic iMicro and appeared required for their phagocytic function. When co-cultured with neuronal cells, the support of iMicro with defective WASp function to neuronal wiring was impaired. Similarly, zebrafish embryos exposed to WASp inhibition showed brain accumulation of uncleared apoptotic bodies, reduced brain colonization of myeloid cells, and impaired sensorimotor response to mechanical stimuli.These findings identify WASp as a regulator of microglial phagocytosis and cytoskeletal dynamics, with implication in neuronal wiring during neurodevelopment.
items.title_en: The Wiskott-Aldrich Syndrome protein (WASp) contribution to microglial phagocytic function and neurodevelopmental support.
items.title_cn: Wiskott-Aldrich 综合征蛋白 (WASp) 对小胶质细胞吞噬功能和神经发育支持的贡献。
items.abstract_cn: 骨髓祖细胞在胚胎发生过程中定植于大脑并分化为小胶质细胞。小胶质细胞在发育过程中塑造神经元接线，并在成年期维持大脑稳态，这两种行为都需要完整的细胞骨架功能。 Wiskott-Aldrich 综合征蛋白 (WASp) 介导外周骨髓细胞的细胞骨架动力学，表明在小胶质细胞中也具有类似的作用。为了研究 WASp 在小胶质细胞中的作用，我们损害了人诱导多能干细胞衍生的小胶质细胞 (iMicro) 和斑马鱼胚胎中的 WASp 功能。WASp 与吞噬细胞 iMicro 中膜皱褶处的肌动蛋白细胞骨架共定位，并且似乎是其吞噬功能所必需的。当与神经元细胞共培养时，WASp 功能缺陷的 iMicro 对神经元连线的支持受到损害。同样，受到 WASp 抑制的斑马鱼胚胎显示，未清除的凋亡小体在大脑中积聚，骨髓细胞的大脑定植减少，对机械刺激的感觉运动反应受损。这些发现表明，WASp 是小胶质细胞吞噬作用和细胞骨架动力学的调节因子，与神经发育过程中的神经元布线有关。

items.title: aPKC exclusion from the apical cortex in enteroblasts maintains stem cell homeostasis in Drosophila.
items.abstract: Proper control of stem cell behavior is crucial for maintaining tissue homeostasis. In the Drosophila midgut, smooth septate junction (sSJ)-associated proteins play a crucial role in regulating intestinal stem cell (ISC) proliferation via atypical PKC (aPKC) activity. Here, we investigate the underlying mechanism. We found that aPKC in the apical cortex diminishes during enteroblast differentiation, in accordance with the apical accumulation of sSJ proteins. In sSJ protein-deficient conditions, aPKC remained in the apical cortex in enteroblasts, accompanied by ISC overproliferation. Manipulation of Kibra, an activator of the Hippo pathway with aPKC-binding properties, affected sSJ proteins depletion-induced ISC overproliferation in an aPKC-binding domain-dependent manner, revealing a link between aPKC and the Hippo- and/or Misshapen-Yorkie pathway in ISC proliferation. This study provides novel insights into the mechanism underlying stem cell regulation, in which an antagonistic interaction between aPKC and junctional proteins in differentiating progenitors is involved.
items.title_en: aPKC exclusion from the apical cortex in enteroblasts maintains stem cell homeostasis in Drosophila.
items.title_cn: 在果蝇中，肠成细胞中 aPKC 被排除在顶皮层之外可维持干​​细胞稳态。
items.abstract_cn: 正确控制干细胞行为对于维持组织稳态至关重要。在果蝇中肠中，平滑隔膜连接 (sSJ) 相关蛋白通过非典型 PKC (aPKC) 活性在调节肠干细胞 (ISC) 增殖中发挥着至关重要的作用。在这里，我们研究了潜在的机制。我们发现，在肠母细胞分化过程中，顶端皮质中的 aPKC 会减少，这与 sSJ 蛋白的顶端积累一致。在 sSJ 蛋白缺乏的条件下，aPKC 保留在肠成细胞的顶皮质中，并伴有 ISC 过度增殖。 Kibra（一种具有 aPKC 结合特性的 Hippo 通路激活剂）的操作，以 aPKC 结合域依赖性方式影响 sSJ 蛋白耗尽诱导的 ISC 过度增殖，揭示了 aPKC 与 ISC 增殖中的 Hippo 和/或 Misshapen-Yorkie 通路之间的联系。这项研究为干细胞调节的机制提供了新的见解，其中涉及分化祖细胞中 aPKC 和连接蛋白之间的拮抗相互作用。

items.title: TREM2 in glioma: Reprogramming the immune microenvironment from mechanistic understanding to clinical translation (Review).
items.authors: Junqi Fan; Hongyan Shen; Dan Liu; Songbai Luo; Qingqing Huang; Yi Wen; Libang Yuan
items.abstract: The poor prognosis of high‑grade gliomas, such as glioblastoma, is largely driven by a notably immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME), wherein microglia and tumor‑associated macrophages play important roles. The present review summarizes the current evidence supporting triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 2 (TREM2) as a key immunoregulator in the glioma TME. The present review explores the context‑dependent dual role of TREM2, which can either be hijacked to promote immunosuppression and tumor progression or inhibit tumor progression through its notable functions in phagocytosis and antigen presentation. The present review also examines the clinical association of TREM2 expression with glioma grade and patient prognosis, evaluating its potential as a diagnostic and prognostic biomarker. Furthermore, the present review discusses the current landscape of TREM2‑targeted therapeutic strategies, from direct TREM2 inhibition and myeloid‑targeted immunocytokines to nano‑engineered drug delivery systems, and addresses the core translational challenges of these strategies. Looking forward, the importance of leveraging spatial multi‑omics and artificial intelligence to decipher the functional heterogeneity of TREM2 and to guide precision immunotherapy is highlighted. In conclusion, the present review provides a comprehensive framework for understanding the role of TREM2 in glioma; this receptor serves not only as a biomarker for glioma, but as an important signaling hub in the glioma TME. Therefore, the present review aims to support the development of novel therapeutic strategies targeting the immune microenvironment in glioma.
items.title_en: TREM2 in glioma: Reprogramming the immune microenvironment from mechanistic understanding to clinical translation (Review).
items.title_cn: 胶质瘤中的 TREM2：将免疫微环境从机械理解重新编程到临床转化（综述）。
items.abstract_cn: 高级别胶质瘤（例如胶质母细胞瘤）的预后不良，很大程度上是由明显的免疫抑制性肿瘤微环境（TME）驱动的，其中小胶质细胞和肿瘤相关巨噬细胞发挥着重要作用。本综述总结了当前支持骨髓细胞表达触发受体 2 (TREM2) 作为神经胶质瘤 TME 中关键免疫调节剂的证据。本综述探讨了 TREM2 的背景依赖性双重作用，它可以被劫持以促进免疫抑制和肿瘤进展，也可以通过其在吞噬作用和抗原呈递中的显着功能来抑制肿瘤进展。本综述还研究了 TREM2 表达与神经胶质瘤分级和患者预后的临床关联，评估其作为诊断和预后生物标志物的潜力。此外，本综述讨论了 TREM2 靶向治疗策略的当前前景，从直接 TREM2 抑制和髓样靶向免疫细胞因子到纳米工程药物递送系统，并解决了这些策略的核心转化挑战。展望未来，利用空间多组学和人工智能来破译 TREM2 的功能异质性并指导精准免疫治疗的重要性凸显。总之，本综述为理解 TREM2 在神经胶质瘤中的作用提供了一个全面的框架；该受体不仅作为神经胶质瘤的生物标志物，而且作为神经胶质瘤 TME 中的重要信号中枢。因此，本综述旨在支持针对神经胶质瘤免疫微环境的新型治疗策略的开发。

items.title: Sex-specific gut microbiota and metabolite signatures in Parkinson's disease: implications for personalized therapeutics.
items.abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is characterized by dopaminergic neuron loss and α-synuclein aggregation in the substantia nigra pars compacta (SNpc). It is a multifactorial disorder with motor and non-motor manifestations and growing evidence suggests that gastrointestinal dysfunction may precede motor onset. Sex differences influence PD risk, onset and clinical features, with men exhibiting higher prevalence and earlier onset, driven by hormonal, genetic, and metabolic factors. The gut microbiota communicates bidirectionally with the central nervous system (CNS) via the gut-brain axis, modulating neural, immune and metabolic processes. Gut dysbiosis and altered microbial metabolites contribute to PD pathogenesis, with distinct sex-specific differences in the microbial composition and functional dynamics of gut microbiota. Despite growing evidence linking the gut-brain axis to PD, sex-specific regulation of microbiota-metabolite interactions remains poorly understood, representing a critical knowledge gap. Further most studies are male-biased, neglecting sex-specific variations in microbial profiles, hormone dynamics, metabolic responses and treatment outcomes. This review addresses current evidence on sex-specific interactions between gut microbiota, metabolites, microbial metabolites and PD mechanisms, highlighting their role in oxidative stress, neuroinflammation, glial dysfunction and genetic predisposition. It further emphasizes the need for sex-tailored, precision therapeutic strategies integrating hormonal, genetic and microbial determinants to improve clinical PD outcomes.
items.title_en: Sex-specific gut microbiota and metabolite signatures in Parkinson's disease: implications for personalized therapeutics.
items.title_cn: 帕金森病中性别特异性肠道微生物群和代谢特征：对个性化治疗的影响。
items.abstract_cn: 帕金森病 (PD) 的特征是黑质致密部 (SNpc) 中多巴胺能神经元丢失和 α-突触核蛋白聚集。它是一种多因素疾病，具有运动和非运动表现，越来越多的证据表明胃肠功能障碍可能先于运动发作。性别差异影响帕金森病的风险、发病率和临床特征，受激素、遗传和代谢因素的影响，男性患病率较高且发病较早。肠道微生物群通过肠脑轴与中枢神经系统 (CNS) 进行双向交流，调节神经、免疫和代谢过程。肠道菌群失调和微生物代谢物的改变导致帕金森病的发病机制，肠道菌群的微生物组成和功能动态具有明显的性别特异性差异。尽管越来越多的证据表明肠-脑轴与帕金森病有关，但微生物群-代谢物相互作用的性别特异性调节仍然知之甚少，这代表了一个关键的知识差距。此外，大多数研究都偏向男性，忽略了微生物特征、激素动态、代谢反应和治疗结果的性别特异性差异。这篇综述探讨了肠道微生物群、代谢物、微生物代谢物和 PD 机制之间性别特异性相互作用的最新证据，强调了它们在氧化应激、神经炎症、神经胶质功能障碍和遗传易感性中的作用。它进一步强调需要根据性别定制、整合激素、遗传和微生物决定因素的精准治疗策略，以改善临床帕金森病的结果。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Single-nucleus multiome shows motor neuron glutamate overactivation in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Eriko Takeuchi; Yoshiaki Yasumizu; Junko Morita; Masakazu Ishikawa; Kotaro Ogawa; Daisuke Motooka; Daisuke Okuzaki; Miho Nagata
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a neurodegenerative disease that causes motor neuron degeneration. However, the mechanisms underlying the selective vulnerability of motor neurons and the involvement of non-motor neuron cells in ALS remain unclear. To investigate ALS pathology at the cellular level, we performed a single-nucleus multiome analysis, including RNA sequencing and chromatin accessibility profiling, on the motor cortex (75 583 nuclei) and spinal cord (62 711 nuclei) from patients with ALS (n = 6) and controls (n = 6). Our results revealed significant gene expression changes specifically in spinal motor neurons, including upregulation of a metabotropic glutamate receptor, GRM5, and enhanced glutamate signalling. By integrating genome-wide association study data, we identified ALS-associated single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) in regulatory regions, suggesting cell-type-specific enrichment of risk, especially in microglia. These findings suggest that changes in spinal motor neurons and their surrounding environment, including glutamate signalling, may be involved in ALS pathology. The study also provides valuable resources for future research on the underlying mechanisms and potential therapeutic targets.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Single-nucleus multiome shows motor neuron glutamate overactivation in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 单核多组显示肌萎缩侧索硬化症中运动神经元谷氨酸过度激活。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）是一种导致运动神经元变性的神经退行性疾病。然而，运动神经元选择性脆弱性和非运动神经元细胞参与 ALS 的机制仍不清楚。为了在细胞水平上研究 ALS 病理学，我们对 ALS 患者 (n = 6) 和对照 (n = 6) 的运动皮层（75 583 个核）和脊髓（62 711 个核）进行了单核多组分析，包括 RNA 测序和染色质可及性分析。我们的结果揭示了脊髓运动神经元中的显着基因表达变化，包括代谢型谷氨酸受体 GRM5 的上调和谷氨酸信号传导的增强。通过整合全基因组关联研究数据，我们在调控区域鉴定了 ALS 相关的单核苷酸多态性 (SNP)，表明细胞类型特异性的风险富集，尤其是在小胶质细胞中。这些发现表明脊髓运动神经元及其周围环境（包括谷氨酸信号传导）的变化可能与 ALS 病理有关。该研究还为未来研究潜在机制和潜在治疗靶点提供了宝贵的资源。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Fus-depleted oligodendrocytes reduce neuronal damage and Alzheimer's disease progression in the AppNL-G-F mouse.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Te-Hsuan Tung; Sudhagar Babu; Xiangting Tang; Alec L Sciutto; Micah Romer; Prathima Racha; Rong Xu; Victoria Fiesler
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is an age-dependent neurodegenerative disorder and represents the most common type of dementia, increasing in incidence at an alarming rate in the aging population. The hallmarks of the disease are amyloid plaque accumulation, microglia and astrocyte activation, and loss of presynaptic structure leading to cognitive decline. Recently, oligodendrocyte (OL) and myelin abnormalities have emerged as important contributors to the pathogenesis of AD. In normal brain homeostatic conditions, OL maintain neuronal health through myelin axon interactions and by supplying neurotrophic and metabolic support. How strengthening OL function may support neuronal health in AD neurodegeneration remains to be fully characterized and represents a gap in knowledge and a missed therapeutic opportunity. This study sought to examine how myelin and OL may improve neuronal deficits associated with AD. We have generated a novel mouse model (AD/cKO) by crossing the AppNL-G-F mouse, an established AD model, which carries three human AD mutations in the mouse App gene, with the FusOLcKO whose OL depleted of Fus (Fused in Sarcoma) produce thicker myelin associated with greater cholesterol biosynthesis. We evaluated spatial memory function with standardized cognitive testing. We evaluated microglia density and state, astrocytic activation and toxic phenotype, myelin density, cholesterol content, amyloid plaque burden, presynaptic structures, and neuronal hypoxic and oxidative damage in the hippocampus and cortex. We characterized the transcriptome of AD/cKO hippocampal OL compared to AD by using single-cell transcriptomic studies. Spatial working memory was fully preserved in the aged AD/cKO mouse relative to the AD mouse. This outcome was associated with reduced neuronal oxidative damage, preserved presynaptic structures at the amyloid plaque niches, and a shift in microglia state at the niches in both hippocampus and cortex. In contrast, amyloid plaque burden and microglia density were decreased in the hippocampus but not in cortex, uncoupling the neuronal and microglia effects from the amyloid burden. Fus dependent myelin increase was present in both hippocampus and cortex. Single-cell transcriptomics of AD/cKO hippocampal OL revealed upregulation of energy metabolism and antioxidant genes, suggesting a role of OL enhanced energy metabolism in mediating protection of neurons and affecting microglia state in AD pathology. This work provides new insight into how oligodendrocytes may protect neurons in AD, communicate with other glial cellular players, and point to potential targets for disease intervention aimed at slowing AD progression.

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Dual tumour-myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Neil Savage; Shan Grewal; Muhammad Vaseem Shaikh; Franz J Zemp; Dillon Mckenna; Nicholas Mikolajewicz; Hinda Najem; Joanna Pyczek
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Glioblastoma is a lethal brain tumour for which current multimodal treatment rarely prevents recurrence1. Therapeutic failure is driven by extensive intratumoural cellular heterogeneity2 with a microenvironment dominated by tumour-associated macrophages that sustain tumour growth and immunosuppression3. Although chimeric antigen receptor (CAR)-T cell therapies are being developed for glioblastoma, sustained response has been undermined by non-uniform antigen expression, antigen loss and microenvironmental barriers that are not directly engaged by tumour-targeting designs4. These limitations motivate new strategies that address the disease as a coupled tumour-immune system rather than a single malignant compartment. Here we use a multi-omic target discovery platform to identify GPNMB as a dual-compartment antigen in glioblastoma. Anti-GPNMB CAR-T cells showed potent anti-tumour activity, with long-term disease control in orthotopic patient-derived xenografts and syngeneic glioma models through concomitant depletion of GPNMB+ tumour and immunosuppressive myeloid populations. By collapsing tumour control and microenvironmental reprogramming, these findings provide a new strategy for antigen selection and targeting in heterogenous, myeloid-rich solid cancers.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Dual tumour-myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 使用 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞对胶质母细胞瘤进行双肿瘤-骨髓靶向治疗。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤是一种致命的脑肿瘤，目前的多模式治疗很少能防止复发1。治疗失败的原因是广泛的肿瘤内细胞异质性2，其微环境以维持肿瘤生长和免疫抑制的肿瘤相关巨噬细胞为主3。尽管针对胶质母细胞瘤的嵌合抗原受体 (CAR)-T 细胞疗法正在开发中，但持续的反应已被不均匀的抗原表达、抗原丢失和与肿瘤靶向设计不直接相关的微环境障碍所破坏。这些限制激发了新的策略，将这种疾病作为一个耦合的肿瘤免疫系统而不是单一的恶性区室来解决。在这里，我们使用多组学靶标发现平台将 GPNMB 鉴定为胶质母细胞瘤中的双室抗原。抗 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞显示出有效的抗肿瘤活性，通过同时消除 GPNMB+ 肿瘤和免疫抑制性骨髓细胞群，在原位患者来源的异种移植物和同基因神经胶质瘤模型中实现长期疾病控制。通过破坏肿瘤控制和微环境重编程，这些发现为异源、富含骨髓的实体癌的抗原选择和靶向提供了新策略。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: King's stages of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: an 18F-FDG-PET study of brain connectivity.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Francesca Di Pede; Sara Cabras; Umberto Manera; Rosario Vasta; Grazia Zocco; Emilio Minerva; Enrico Matteoni; Filippo De Mattei
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a fatal neurodegenerative disease affecting upper and lower motor neurons. TAR DNA-binding protein 43 (TDP-43) proteinopathy is the neuropathological signature of the disease, and 18F-fluorodeoxyglucose PET (18F-FDG-PET) serves as a marker of neurodegeneration in vivo. The aim of the present cross-sectional study was to disentangle 18F-FDG-PET correlates of disease severity assessed through the King's staging system, by exploring connectivity changes across motor stages. Patients with ALS classified as King's stage 1, 2 or 3, who underwent brain 18F-FDG-PET at diagnosis from 2008 to 2022 at the ALS Centre of Turin, were included. A multiple regression analysis to evaluate the relationship between brain metabolism and King's stage was performed. The clusters showing significant results were used as seed regions in an interregional correlation analysis (IRCA), performed for each stage. Of a total of 832 patients with ALS, 337 were classified as King's stage 1, 274 as stage 2 and 221 as stage 3. The three groups significantly differed in age at PET, disease duration and total ALS Functional Rating Scale Revised (ALSFRS-R) score at the time of PET, C9orf72 status and the distribution of cognitive categories. We found a decreasing metabolic gradient from King's stage 1 to King's stage 3 in a cluster encompassing motor and cognitive areas. As King's stage increases, we found a decrease of connectivity within the sensorimotor and cognitive areas. The IRCA also showed the connectivity of motor and cognitive regions with temporal and cerebellar regions. The connectivity with temporal regions found in King's stage 1 decreases in King's stage 2 and finally, disappears in King's stage 3. The connectivity with the cerebellum occurs in King's stage 2 and decreases in King's stage 3. The changes of connectivity of motor and cognitive areas with temporal and cerebellar regions among different King's stages might reflect the spread of TDP-43 proteinopathy or a compensatory mechanism, respectively. The present study suggests that 18F-FDG-PET imaging of the brain may be integrated with the King's staging system to assess the extent of the pathogenic process in the context of clinical trials.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: King's stages of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: an 18F-FDG-PET study of brain connectivity.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症的 King 阶段：大脑连接的 18F-FDG-PET 研究。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）是一种致命的神经退行性疾病，影响上运动神经元和下运动神经元。 TAR DNA 结合蛋白 43 (TDP-43) 蛋白病是该疾病的神经病理学特征，18F-氟脱氧葡萄糖 PET (18F-FDG-PET) 是体内神经变性的标志物。本横断面研究的目的是通过探索运动阶段的连接变化，理清通过 King 分期系统评估的 18F-FDG-PET 与疾病严重程度的相关性。研究纳入了 2008 年至 2022 年在都灵 ALS 中心诊断时接受脑部 18F-FDG-PET 诊断的 King's 1、2 或 3 期 ALS 患者。进行了多元回归分析来评估脑代谢与国王分期之间的关系。显示显着结果的簇被用作区域间相关分析 (IRCA) 中的种子区域，针对每个阶段进行。在总共 832 名 ALS 患者中，337 名被分类为 King's 1 期，274 名被分类为 2 期，221 名被分类为 3 期。三组在 PET 年龄、疾病持续时间和 PET 时 ALS 功能评定量表修订版 (ALSFRS-R) 总分、C9orf72 状态和认知类别分布方面存在显着差异。我们发现，在包含运动和认知区域的集群中，从 King's 第一阶段到 King's 第三阶段，代谢梯度逐渐减小。随着金阶段的增加，我们发现感觉运动和认知区域内的连接性减少。 IRCA 还显示了运动和认知区域与颞叶和小脑区域的连通性。 King's 1期中发现的与颞区的连通性在King's 2期中减少，最后在King's 3期中消失。与小脑的连通性出现在King's 2期中，并在King's 3期中减少。不同King's阶段中运动和认知区域与颞叶和小脑区域的连通性变化可能分别反映了TDP-43蛋白病的扩散或补偿机制。目前的研究表明，大脑的 18F-FDG-PET 成像可以与 King 分期系统相结合，以评估帕特的程度……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Tau pathology in epilepsy: emerging mechanisms and translational opportunities.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Arjune Sen; Xin You Tai; Aristea Galanopoulou; Maria Thom; Eleonora Aronica; Lucy Vivash; Martin Hardmeier; Action Amos
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: The onset of epilepsy in adulthood occurs most commonly after 55 years of age. Given the ageing global population, this disorder represents an increasing burden on healthcare and society. The bidirectional link between epilepsy and dementia is a focus of intense research with underlying tau pathology highlighted as a potential mechanistic link. In this review, we examine the evidence for tau-related neurodegenerative processes in epilepsy beginning with how changes in biochemical and structural properties of the tau protein can lead to abnormal phosphorylation and pathological aggregation. We consider the role of tau in seizure occurrence and cognitive difficulties in experimental animal epilepsy models to human epileptic syndromes. Seizure prevalence is evaluated across established primary and secondary tauopathies to understand the associated hyperexcitability phenotype. We discuss the use of neurophysiology, metabolic imaging and novel fluid biomarkers as non-invasive measures of potential underlying neurodegeneration in epilepsy. It may, for example, be that these can be combined with remote measures of cognition and other physiological parameters to provide accurate longitudinal monitoring of cognition and underlying pathology. We also explore clinical trials that have targeted pathological tau accumulation in neurodegenerative conditions and consider an ongoing clinical study with sodium selenate, an enhancer of protein phosphatase enzyme PP2A, in people with epilepsy. These efforts signify a novel disease-modifying era with treatments that reduce seizures and modify cognitive outcomes in people with epilepsy. Our analysis of the literature underscores the need for more in-depth characterization of tau pathology, at biochemical and structural levels in brain tissue and peripheral samples from people with epilepsy, as an important step to deciphering the role of tau in the pathogenesis of epilepsy and related disorders. Examining the relationships between tau pathology and cognitive impairment in those with epilepsy provides critical perspectives on potential causal tau pathomechanisms that may have important roles in epileptogenesis and dementia.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Tau pathology in epilepsy: emerging mechanisms and translational opportunities.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 癫痫中的 Tau 蛋白病理学：新兴机制和转化机会。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 成年期癫痫最常见于 55 岁以后。鉴于全球人口老龄化，这种疾病给医疗保健和社会带来了越来越大的负担。癫痫和痴呆之间的双向联系是深入研究的焦点，其中潜在的 tau 病理学被强调为潜在的机制联系。在这篇综述中，我们从 tau 蛋白的生化和结构特性的变化如何导致异常磷酸化和病理聚集开始，研究了癫痫中与 tau 相关的神经退行性过程的证据。我们考虑了 tau 在人类癫痫综合征实验动物癫痫模型中癫痫发作和认知困难中的作用。评估已确定的原发性和继发性 tau蛋白病的癫痫发作率，以了解相关的过度兴奋表型。我们讨论使用神经生理学、代谢成像和新型液体生物标志物作为癫痫潜在潜在神经退行性变的非侵入性测量。例如，这些可以与认知和其他生理参数的远程测量相结合，以提供对认知和潜在病理学的准确纵向监测。我们还探索了针对神经退行性疾病中病理性 tau 蛋白积累的临床试验，并考虑正在进行一项针对癫痫患者的硒酸钠（蛋白磷酸酶 PP2A 的增强剂）临床研究。这些努力标志着一个新的疾病缓解时代，通过治疗可以减少癫痫患者的癫痫发作并改变认知结果。我们对文献的分析强调，需要在癫痫患者的脑组织和外周样本的生化和结构水平上更深入地表征 tau 病理学，这是破译 tau 在癫痫及相关疾病发病机制中的作用的重要一步。检查癫痫患者的 tau 蛋白病理学与认知障碍之间的关系，为研究可能在癫痫发生和痴呆中发挥重要作用的潜在因果 tau 蛋白病理机制提供了重要的视角。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: The NeuroBioBank whole-genome catalogue of human brain donors with central nervous system disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Daniel Hupalo; Jacob L McCauley; Lissette Gomez; Anthony J Griswold; Gabriela Hoher; Ioanna Konidari; Jose Lorenzo; Griffin S Parker
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: CNS diseases are a prevailing cause of morbidity and mortality worldwide, and are influenced by environmental and biological factors, including genetic risk. Here, we generated genome-wide genetic data on a large cohort of brain tissue donors with in-depth clinical and neuropathological phenotyping, allowing for broad investigations into the risk and mechanisms of these neurological, neurodevelopmental and psychiatric conditions. This resource consists of 9663 donors with array-based genotyping and 9543 donors with whole-genome sequencing completed. The clinical diagnoses of these donors include 148 CNS diseases clustered into 15 broad categories by International Classification of Diseases-10 (ICD-10) coding. These donors were collected by six repositories comprising the National Institutes of Health NeuroBioBank, with an average participant age of 60 years. While primarily older individuals of European descent, the cohort also contains younger donors and individuals from non-European backgrounds. Variants were detected in whole-genome sequencing, normalized and annotated to describe their functional impact, resulting in 171 121 209 unique variants and 1 078 774 non-silent variants. These raw and normalized data have been made available as a neurogenomics resource in the National Institute of Mental Health Data Archive (nda.nih.gov), combined with donor-matched deep demographic and phenotypic data from the NeuroBioBank Portal (neurobiobank.nih.gov). To illustrate applications, we replicated the strong association observed in previous studies between pathogenic CAG nucleotide repeat expansions in the HTT gene with the clinical diagnosis of Huntington's disease, as well as associations of the APOE gene with Alzheimer's disease, and examined the association of polygenic risk scores with the three most common disease diagnoses in the cohort.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: The NeuroBioBank whole-genome catalogue of human brain donors with central nervous system disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: NeuroBioBank 患有中枢神经系统疾病的人脑捐赠者的全基因组目录。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 中枢神经系统疾病是全世界发病和死亡的主要原因，并受到环境和生物因素（包括遗传风险）的影响。在这里，我们对大量脑组织捐献者生成了全基因组遗传数据，并进行了深入的临床和神经病理学表型分析，从而可以对这些神经、神经发育和精神疾病的风险和机制进行广泛的研究。该资源由 9663 名进行了基于芯片基因分型的捐赠者和 9543 名完成了全基因组测序的捐赠者组成。这些捐献者的临床诊断包括 148 种中枢神经系统疾病，按国际疾病分类 10 (ICD-10) 编码分为 15 大类。这些捐赠者由美国国立卫生研究院 NeuroBioBank 组成的 6 个储存库收集，参与者的平均年龄为 60 岁。虽然该群体主要是欧洲血统的老年个体，但也包含年轻的捐赠者和来自非欧洲背景的个体。在全基因组测序中检测到变异，对其进行标准化和注释以描述其功能影响，从而产生 171 121 209 个独特变异和 1 078 774 个非沉默变异。这些原始和标准化数据已作为神经基因组学资源在国家心理健康研究所数据档案库 (nda.nih.gov) 中提供，并结合来自 NeuroBioBank 门户网站 (neurobiobank.nih.gov) 的捐赠者匹配的深度人口统计和表型数据。为了说明应用，我们复制了之前研究中观察到的 HTT 基因中致病性 CAG 核苷酸重复扩增与亨廷顿病临床诊断之间的强关联，以及 APOE 基因与阿尔茨海默病的关联，并检查了多基因风险评分与队列中三种最常见疾病诊断的关联。

英文题目：The NeuroBioBank whole-genome catalogue of human brain donors with central nervous system disorders.

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：中枢神经系统疾病是全世界发病和死亡的主要原因，并受到环境和生物因素（包括遗传风险）的影响。在这里，我们对大量脑组织捐献者生成了全基因组遗传数据，并进行了深入的临床和神经病理学表型分析，从而可以对这些神经、神经发育和精神疾病的风险和机制进行广泛的研究。该资源由 9663 名进行了基于芯片基因分型的捐赠者和 9543 名完成了全基因组测序的捐赠者组成。这些捐献者的临床诊断包括 148 种中枢神经系统疾病，按国际疾病分类 10 (ICD-10) 编码分为 15 大类。这些捐赠者由美国国立卫生研究院 NeuroBioBank 组成的 6 个储存库收集，参与者的平均年龄为 60 岁。虽然该群体主要是欧洲血统的老年个体，但也包含年轻的捐赠者和来自非欧洲背景的个体。在全基因组测序中检测到变异，对其进行标准化和注释以描述其功能影响，从而产生 171 121 209 个独特变异和 1 078 774 个非沉默变异。这些原始和标准化数据已作为神经基因组学资源在国家心理健康研究所数据档案库 (nda.nih.gov) 中提供，并结合来自 NeuroBioBank 门户网站 (neurobiobank.nih.gov) 的捐赠者匹配的深度人口统计和表型数据。为了说明应用，我们复制了之前研究中观察到的 HTT 基因中致病性 CAG 核苷酸重复扩增与亨廷顿病临床诊断之间的强关联，以及 APOE 基因与阿尔茨海默病的关联，并检查了多基因风险评分与队列中三种最常见疾病诊断的关联。

临床/科研意义：建议重点核对研究对象、模型、干预方式、主要终点和局限性，再判断是否纳入综述或选题库。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: The deep brain stimulation response network in Parkinson's disease operates in the high beta band.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Bahne H Bahners; Lukas L Goede; Patricia Zvarova; Garance M Meyer; Konstantin Butenko; Roxanne Lofredi; Nanditha Rajamani; Frederic L W V J Schaper
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Deep brain stimulation (DBS) of the subthalamic nucleus improves motor symptoms in patients with Parkinson's disease. Using functional MRI, optimal DBS response networks have been characterized. However, neural activity associated with Parkinsonian symptoms is magnitudes faster than what can be resolved by this method. Although both spatial and temporal domains of these networks appear crucial, no single study has yet investigated both domains simultaneously. Here, we aimed at closing this gap by analysing electrophysiological data from a total of n = 127 hemispheres. Using subthalamic local field potentials that were recorded concurrently alongside whole-brain magnetoencephalography in a multi-centre cohort of patients who underwent subthalamic DBS for the treatment of Parkinson's disease (n = 100 hemispheres), we analysed the DBS response network in both spatial and temporal domains. In every cortical vertex, cortico-subthalamic coupling was correlated with stimulation outcomes. This network spatially resembled functional MRI-based findings (R = 0.40, P = 0.039) and explained significant amounts of variance in clinical outcomes (βstd = 0.30, P = 0.002), whereas theta-alpha and low beta coupling did not show significant associations with DBS response (theta-alpha: βstd = -0.02, P = 0.805; low beta: βstd = -0.08, P = 0.426). The 'optimal' high beta coupling map was robust when subjected to various cross-validation designs (10-fold cross-validation: R = 0.29, P = 0.009; split-half design: R = 0.31, P = 0.026) and was able to predict outcomes across DBS centres [R = 0.74; P(1) = 8.9 × 10-5]. We identified a DBS response network that resembles the previously defined MRI network and operates in the high beta band. Maximal connectivity to this network was associated with optimal DBS outcomes and was able to cross-predict clinical improvements across DBS surgeons and centres.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: The deep brain stimulation response network in Parkinson's disease operates in the high beta band.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 帕金森病的深部脑刺激反应网络在高β带运行。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 丘脑底核的深部脑刺激（DBS）可改善帕金森病患者的运动症状。使用功能性 MRI，已对最佳 DBS 反应网络进行了表征。然而，与帕金森症状相关的神经活动比这种方法所能解决的要快得多。尽管这些网络的空间和时间域似乎都至关重要，但尚未有任何一项研究同时研究这两个域。在这里，我们旨在通过分析总共 n = 127 个半球的电生理数据来缩小这一差距。在接受丘脑 DBS 治疗帕金森病的多中心患者队列（n = 100 个半球）中，使用与全脑脑磁图同时记录的丘脑局部场电位，我们分析了时空域的 DBS 反应网络。在每个皮质顶点，皮质-底丘脑耦合与刺激结果相关。该网络在空间上类似于基于功能性 MRI 的发现（R = 0.40，P = 0.039），并解释了临床结果的显着差异（βstd = 0.30，P = 0.002），而 theta-alpha 和低 beta 耦合并未显示与 DBS 反应显着相关（theta-alpha：βstd = -0.02，P = 0.805；低 beta：βstd = -0.08，P = 0.426）。当进行各种交叉验证设计（10倍交叉验证：R = 0.29，P = 0.009；分半设计：R = 0.31，P = 0.026）时，“最佳”高β耦合图是稳健的，并且能够预测 DBS 中心的结果 [R = 0.74； P(1) = 8.9 × 10-5]。我们确定了一个 DBS 响应网络，类似于之前定义的 MRI 网络，并在高 beta 频段运行。与该网络的最大连接性与最佳 DBS 结果相关，并且能够交叉预测 DBS 外科医生和中心的临床改善。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: The tau biomarker cascade is condensed in Down syndrome compared with sporadic Alzheimer's disease.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Matthew D Zammit; Hailey Bruzzone; Karly A Cody; Jacob Morse; Rachael Wilson; Brecca T Bettcher; Max J McLachlan; Andrew K McVea
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Characterizing the timing and progression of Alzheimer's disease biomarker onset in Down syndrome (DS) and contrasting potential timing differences with neurotypical adults is needed to identify optimal Alzheimer's disease therapeutic treatment windows in DS. In this study, 198 adults with DS from the Alzheimer Biomarker Consortium-Down Syndrome and 172 neurotypical adults from the Wisconsin Registry for Alzheimer's Prevention with available longitudinal beta-amyloid PET, tau PET and plasma p-tau217 analysed on the Lilly Meso Scale Delivery Platform were included. Individuals with DS had a significantly higher lifetime risk of beta-amyloid plaque onset. Temporal modelling of longitudinal biomarker measures revealed earlier age at positivity of beta-amyloid plaques, p-tau217 and neurofibrillary tau tangles in DS relative to the neurotypical cohort. The onset of p-tau217 and tau PET positivity in DS occurred nearly simultaneously, roughly 4-6 years following beta-amyloid onset, whereas the neurotypical group displayed greater temporal latency between positivity of the two biomarkers. The early and simultaneous onset of these biomarkers in DS highlights the necessity for early therapeutic interventions in this population. This work, combined with the upcoming anti-amyloid safety and efficacy clinical trials for DS will help to identify optimal treatment windows for these individuals.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: The tau biomarker cascade is condensed in Down syndrome compared with sporadic Alzheimer's disease.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 与散发性阿尔茨海默病相比，唐氏综合症中的 tau 生物标志物级联反应更为浓缩。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 需要表征唐氏综合症 (DS) 中阿尔茨海默病生物标志物发病的时间和进展，并对比与神经正常成人的潜在时间差异，以确定 DS 中阿尔茨海默病的最佳治疗窗口。在这项研究中，纳入了来自阿尔茨海默生物标志物联盟唐氏综合症的 198 名 DS 成年人和来自威斯康星州阿尔茨海默病预防登记处的 172 名神经正常成年人，他们在 Lilly Meso Scale Delivery Platform 上进行了可用的纵向 β-淀粉样蛋白 PET、tau PET 和血浆 p-tau217 分析。 DS 患者终生出现 β-淀粉样斑块的风险显着更高。纵向生物标志物测量的时间模型显示，与神经典型队列相比，DS 中 β-淀粉样斑块、p-tau217 和神经原纤维 tau 缠结呈阳性的年龄更早。 DS 中 p-tau217 和 tau PET 阳性的出现几乎同时发生，大约在 β-淀粉样蛋白出现后 4-6 年，而神经典型组在两种生物标志物的阳性之间表现出更大的时间潜伏期。 DS 中这些生物标志物的早期和同时出现凸显了对该人群进行早期治疗干预的必要性。这项工作与即将开展的 DS 抗淀粉样蛋白安全性和有效性临床试验相结合，将有助于确定这些个体的最佳治疗窗口。

global_hot_topics.title: TREM2 in glioma: Reprogramming the immune microenvironment from mechanistic understanding to clinical translation (Review).
global_hot_topics.authors: Junqi Fan; Hongyan Shen; Dan Liu; Songbai Luo; Qingqing Huang; Yi Wen; Libang Yuan
global_hot_topics.abstract: The poor prognosis of high‑grade gliomas, such as glioblastoma, is largely driven by a notably immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME), wherein microglia and tumor‑associated macrophages play important roles. The present review summarizes the current evidence supporting triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 2 (TREM2) as a key immunoregulator in the glioma TME. The present review explores the context‑dependent dual role of TREM2, which can either be hijacked to promote immunosuppression and tumor progression or inhibit tumor progression through its notable functions in phagocytosis and antigen presentation. The present review also examines the clinical association of TREM2 expression with glioma grade and patient prognosis, evaluating its potential as a diagnostic and prognostic biomarker. Furthermore, the present review discusses the current landscape of TREM2‑targeted therapeutic strategies, from direct TREM2 inhibition and myeloid‑targeted immunocytokines to nano‑engineered drug delivery systems, and addresses the core translational challenges of these strategies. Looking forward, the importance of leveraging spatial multi‑omics and artificial intelligence to decipher the functional heterogeneity of TREM2 and to guide precision immunotherapy is highlighted. In conclusion, the present review provides a comprehensive framework for understanding the role of TREM2 in glioma; this receptor serves not only as a biomarker for glioma, but as an important signaling hub in the glioma TME. Therefore, the present review aims to support the development of novel therapeutic strategies targeting the immune microenvironment in glioma.
global_hot_topics.title_en: TREM2 in glioma: Reprogramming the immune microenvironment from mechanistic understanding to clinical translation (Review).
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 胶质瘤中的 TREM2：将免疫微环境从机械理解重新编程到临床转化（综述）。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 高级别胶质瘤（例如胶质母细胞瘤）的预后不良，很大程度上是由明显的免疫抑制性肿瘤微环境（TME）驱动的，其中小胶质细胞和肿瘤相关巨噬细胞发挥着重要作用。本综述总结了当前支持骨髓细胞表达触发受体 2 (TREM2) 作为神经胶质瘤 TME 中关键免疫调节剂的证据。本综述探讨了 TREM2 的背景依赖性双重作用，它可以被劫持以促进免疫抑制和肿瘤进展，也可以通过其在吞噬作用和抗原呈递中的显着功能来抑制肿瘤进展。本综述还研究了 TREM2 表达与神经胶质瘤分级和患者预后的临床关联，评估其作为诊断和预后生物标志物的潜力。此外，本综述讨论了 TREM2 靶向治疗策略的当前前景，从直接 TREM2 抑制和髓样靶向免疫细胞因子到纳米工程药物递送系统，并解决了这些策略的核心转化挑战。展望未来，利用空间多组学和人工智能来破译 TREM2 的功能异质性并指导精准免疫治疗的重要性凸显。总之，本综述为理解 TREM2 在神经胶质瘤中的作用提供了一个全面的框架；该受体不仅作为神经胶质瘤的生物标志物，而且作为神经胶质瘤 TME 中的重要信号中枢。因此，本综述旨在支持针对神经胶质瘤免疫微环境的新型治疗策略的开发。

global_hot_topics.title: Treatment trajectories and patterns following non-medical switching to biosimilar adalimumab in patients with hidradenitis suppurativa: a retrospective observational multicenter study from Saudi Arabia.
global_hot_topics.authors: Ahmed Alamer; Taibah AbuTaki; Shareefa Mohammed Alonaizi; Dalal Saadoun Alsaadoun; Mukhtar Alomar
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Adalimumab is the first biologic approved for moderate-to-severe hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). Considering potential cost savings, real-world data evaluating the prescribing patterns following a switch from the originator in HS remain limited. METHODS: We conducted a retrospective multicenter observational study (2019-2025) at two hospitals in Saudi Arabia. Adult HS patients who received originator adalimumab for ≥3 months, and then switched to its biosimilar for non-medical reasons for ≥3 months were included. Descriptive statistics summarized baseline characteristics. A Wilcoxon paired test compared treatment durations, and a Sankey diagram illustrated treatment pathways. RESULTS: A total of 40 patients were included (median age: 26 years; 62.5% male; median BMI: 31.6). Most presented with nodules (55.0%), abscesses (47.5%), and sinus tracts (37.5%). Among all treatment actions/pathways, 22.6% represented treatment escalation to an alternative biologic, specifically secukinumab or ustekinumab. Patients who were switched from biosimilar therapy demonstrated more severe disease involvement. Median duration of originator therapy was 6.0 months versus 21.0 months for biosimilar (p = 0.477), with no significant difference in treatment persistence. CONCLUSION: In this small real-world cohort, treatment escalation after switching to biosimilar adalimumab was observed in a subset of patients with more complex HS features. Larger studies using standardized severity measures are needed to confirm these observations. Hidradenitis suppurativa is a long-term skin condition that can cause painful lumps, abscesses, tunnels under the skin, and scarring. Adalimumab is one of the treatments used for moderate-to-severe hidradenitis suppurativa. In some hospitals, patients may be changed from the original adalimumab product to a biosimilar version, which is designed to be highly similar to the original version and may help reduce treatment costs.In this study, we reviewed 40 patients from two hospitals in Saudi Arabia who were changed from the original adalimumab to a biosimilar adalimumab for non-medical reasons, mainly because of hospital formulary changes. We examined prescribing patterns and treatment received after the switch.Some patients continued biosimilar adalimumab, while others required changes in their treatment plan. These changes included adding other medications, such as antibiotics or topical treatments, or switching to another biologic treatment. Patients who needed treatment changes often had more complex hidradenitis suppurativa features, such as nodules, abscesses, sinus tracts, scarring, or disease affecting more than one body area.This study describes real-world treatment patterns after switching to biosimilar adalimumab. The findings suggest that follow-up after switching may be important, especially for patients with more complex disease. Larger studies using standard disease severity measures are needed.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Treatment trajectories and patterns following non-medical switching to biosimilar adalimumab in patients with hidradenitis suppurativa: a retrospective observational multicenter study from Saudi Arabia.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 化脓性汗腺炎患者非药物转用生物仿制药阿达木单抗后的治疗轨迹和模式：来自沙特阿拉伯的一项回顾性观察性多中心研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：阿达木单抗是第一个被批准用于治疗中重度化脓性汗腺炎（HS）的生物制剂。考虑到潜在的成本节省，评估 HS 发起者转换后的处方模式的实际数据仍然有限。方法：我们在沙特阿拉伯的两家医院进行了一项回顾性多中心观察研究（2019-2025）。接受原研阿达木单抗治疗 ≥3 个月，然后因非医疗原因改用其生物仿制药治疗 ≥3 个月的成人 HS 患者被纳入研究。描述性统计总结了基线特征。 Wilcoxon 配对测试比较了治疗持续时间，桑基图说明了治疗路径。结果：总共纳入 40 名患者（中位年龄：26 岁；62.5% 为男性；中位 BMI：31.6）。大多数表现为结节（55.0%）、脓肿（47.5%）和窦道（37.5%）。在所有治疗行动/途径中，22.6% 表示治疗升级至替代生物制剂，特别是苏金单抗或优特克单抗。从生物仿制药转为治疗的患者表现出更严重的疾病症状。原研药治疗的中位持续时间为 6.0 个月，而生物仿制药为 21.0 个月 (p = 0.477)，治疗持续性没有显着差异。结论：在这个小型现实世界队列中，在具有更复杂 HS 特征的患者亚组中观察到改用生物仿制药阿达木单抗后治疗升级。需要使用标准化严重程度测量的更大规模的研究来证实这些观察结果。化脓性汗腺炎是一种长期皮肤病，可引起疼痛性肿块、脓肿、皮下隧道和疤痕。阿达木单抗是用于中度至重度化脓性汗腺炎的治疗方法之一。在一些医院，患者可能会从原来的阿达木单抗产品改为生物仿制药版本，该版本的设计与原来的版本高度相似，可能有助于降低治疗成本。在这项研究中，我们回顾了来自沙特阿拉伯两家医院的 40 名患者，这些患者因非医疗原因从原来的阿达木单抗改为生物仿制药阿达木单抗，主要是因为医院处方的变化。我们考试……

global_hot_topics.title: Multi-omics profiling identifies CDK1 as a key mediator of mitosis through the PTN pathway in bladder cancer.
global_hot_topics.authors: Li Yang; Jia-Ming Zhang; Yu-Jia Chen; Zhong-Qiong Wei; Mei Zhou; Guo-Qiang Chen; Yu-Xian He; Zhi-Guang Huang
global_hot_topics.abstract: AIMS: This study aimed to characterize cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1) expression in bladder cancer (BC), elucidate its role in intercellular signaling and mitosis, and identify small-molecule inhibitors targeting CDK1. METHODS: RNA sequencing data from multiple databases were integrated, with immunohistochemistry on tissue microarrays validating protein expression. Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq), spatial transcriptomics (ST), gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA), and molecular docking with molecular dynamics (MD) simulations were performed. RESULTS: CDK1 mRNA and protein were significantly overexpressed in BC tissues. CDK1 expression correlated with patient age and race. CDK1 was predominantly expressed in epithelial cells and central to pleiotrophin (PTN) pathway-mediated intercellular communication; virtual CDK1 knockout markedly reduced PTN signaling strength. ST confirmed CDK1 enrichment in tumor regions. GSEA linked CDK1 to mitosis and chromosome segregation, and scRNA-seq analyses revealed a PTN-CDK1-mitosis regulatory axis active specifically in epithelial cells. Dinaciclib showed favorable MD stability as a CDK1 inhibitor. CONCLUSION: CDK1 is significantly overexpressed in BC with good discriminatory ability. Predominantly expressed in BC epithelial cells, CDK1 may be activated by PTN signaling to drive mitosis. MD simulations support Dinaciclib as a promising CDK1-targeting inhibitor. Bladder cancer is one of the most common cancers of the urinary tract worldwide. Many patients face a difficult challenge: after standard treatments, tumors frequently come back, and existing targeted therapies work for only a small proportion of people. There is therefore an urgent need to better understand what drives bladder cancer growth and to find new treatment targets.This study focused on a protein called CDK1, which acts like a molecular “switch” controlling how and when cells divide. Using data from hundreds of bladder cancer tissue samples across multiple international databases, alongside laboratory staining experiments on tumor tissue, we confirmed that CDK1 levels are significantly higher in bladder cancer than in normal bladder tissue, and that CDK1 can reliably distinguish cancerous from healthy tissue.By examining individual cancer cells using advanced single-cell technologies, we found that CDK1 is concentrated mainly in the lining cells of the bladder tumor. We also identified that a signaling molecule called PTN appears to “switch on” CDK1 in these cells, which in turn drives tumor cells to divide and multiply more rapidly.Finally, using computer-based drug-screening methods, we identified Dinaciclib as a particularly promising molecule capable of blocking CDK1 activity, with stable binding behavior confirmed by computer simulations.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Multi-omics profiling identifies CDK1 as a key mediator of mitosis through the PTN pathway in bladder cancer.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 多组学分析确定 CDK1 是膀胱癌中通过 PTN 途径有丝分裂的关键介质。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：本研究旨在表征膀胱癌 (BC) 中细胞周期蛋白依赖性激酶 1 (CDK1) 的表达，阐明其在细胞间信号传导和有丝分裂中的作用，并鉴定针对 CDK1 的小分子抑制剂。方法：整合来自多个数据库的 RNA 测序数据，并通过组织微阵列上的免疫组织化学验证蛋白质表达。进行了单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq)、空间转录组学 (ST)、基因集富集分析 (GSEA) 以及分子对接与分子动力学 (MD) 模拟。结果：CDK1 mRNA 和蛋白在 BC 组织中显着过表达。 CDK1 表达与患者年龄和种族相关。 CDK1 主要在上皮细胞中表达，并且是多效蛋白 (PTN) 途径介导的细胞间通讯的核心；虚拟 CDK1 敲除显着降低了 PTN 信号强度。 ST 证实了肿瘤区域 CDK1 富集。 GSEA 将 CDK1 与有丝分裂和染色体分离联系起来，scRNA-seq 分析揭示了 PTN-CDK1-有丝分裂调节轴在上皮细胞中特别活跃。 Dinaciclib 作为 CDK1 抑制剂表现出良好的 MD 稳定性。结论：CDK1在BC中显着过表达，具有良好的辨别能力。 CDK1 主要在 BC 上皮细胞中表达，可通过 PTN 信号传导激活以驱动有丝分裂。 MD 模拟支持 Dinaciclib 作为一种有前途的 CDK1 靶向抑制剂。膀胱癌是全世界最常见的泌尿道癌症之一。许多患者面临着一个艰巨的挑战：标准治疗后，肿瘤经常复发，而现有的靶向治疗只对一小部分人有效。因此，迫切需要更好地了解膀胱癌生长的驱动因素并找到新的治疗靶点。这项研究重点关注一种名为 CDK1 的蛋白质，它的作用就像一个控制细胞分裂方式和时间的分子“开关”。使用来自多个国际数据库的数百个膀胱癌组织样本的数据，结合肿瘤组织的实验室染色实验，我们证实膀胱癌中的 CDK1 水平显着高于正常膀胱组织，并且 CDK1……

global_hot_topics.title: Identification of PGF+ endothelial cells associated with plaque instability in carotid atherosclerosis by scRNA-seq and RNA-seq analysis.
global_hot_topics.authors: Yi Xiang; Dong Liu; Wenwen Jin; Tao Xu; Leilei Guo; Tingchun Wu; Yuhua Zheng; Xiaoman Xiong
global_hot_topics.abstract: Vascular endothelial dysfunction plays a critical role in the development of atherosclerosis; however, the mechanisms by which endothelial cells contribute to plaque instability remain incompletely understood. In this study, we performed an integrated analysis of single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) and bulk RNA-seq data to characterize endothelial cell heterogeneity associated with carotid plaque instability. Clustering analysis, gene set variation analysis (GSVA), differential gene expression analysis, and KEGG pathway enrichment were conducted to identify key endothelial cell subsets and their functional characteristics. We identified three endothelial cell subsets (subsets 9, 10, and 11) that were significantly enriched in unstable plaques and exhibited upregulation of multiple pro-inflammatory cytokines. Pathway analysis revealed that these subsets were associated with activation of the PI3K - Akt signaling pathway and other inflammation-related pathways. Furthermore, findings were validated in an apolipoprotein E-deficient (ApoE-/-) mouse model, where increased expression of placental growth factor (PGF) and a higher proportion of PGF-positive endothelial cells were observed in atherosclerotic lesions. In conclusion, this study reveals the heterogeneity of endothelial cells in atherosclerotic plaques and identifies pro-inflammatory endothelial subsets potentially associated with plaque instability, providing new insights into the pathogenesis of atherosclerosis.Trial registration: This study was approved by the Experimental Animal Ethics Committee of Guizhou University of Chinese Medicine (approval number: 2,024,010).
global_hot_topics.title_en: Identification of PGF+ endothelial cells associated with plaque instability in carotid atherosclerosis by scRNA-seq and RNA-seq analysis.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 通过 scRNA-seq 和 RNA-seq 分析鉴定与颈动脉粥样硬化斑块不稳定性相关的 PGF+ 内皮细胞。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 血管内皮功能障碍在动脉粥样硬化的发展中起着至关重要的作用。然而，内皮细胞导致斑块不稳定的机制仍不完全清楚。在这项研究中，我们对单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq) 和批量 RNA-seq 数据进行了综合分析，以表征与颈动脉斑块不稳定相关的内皮细胞异质性。通过聚类分析、基因集变异分析（GSVA）、差异基因表达分析和 KEGG 通路富集来识别关键的内皮细胞亚群及其功能特征。我们鉴定了三个内皮细胞亚群（亚群 9、10 和 11），它们在不稳定斑块中显着富集，并表现出多种促炎细胞因子的上调。通路分析显示，这些亚群与 PI3K - Akt 信号通路和其他炎症相关通路的激活相关。此外，研究结果在载脂蛋白 E 缺陷 (ApoE-/-) 小鼠模型中得到验证，在动脉粥样硬化病变中观察到胎盘生长因子 (PGF) 表达增加和 PGF 阳性内皮细胞比例较高。总之，本研究揭示了动脉粥样硬化斑块中内皮细胞的异质性，并鉴定了可能与斑块不稳定相关的促炎内皮亚群，为动脉粥样硬化的发病机制提供了新的见解。 试验注册：本研究经贵州中医药大学实验动物伦理委员会批准（批准号：2,024,010）。

global_hot_topics.title: TERT drives liver tumorigenesis beyond telomere elongation.
global_hot_topics.authors: Laura Braud; Julien Vernerey; Arnaud Guille; Pierre Cordier; Clémence Ginet; Tom Egger; Manuel Bernabe; Dmitri Churikov
global_hot_topics.abstract: We generated two mouse models, p21+/Tert and p21+/TertCi, expressing either telomerase reverse transcriptase (Tert) or a catalytically inactive variant under the control of the p21 promoter. By 18-20 mo of age, ∼15% of mice from both genotypes developed liver tumors with histopathological features resembling human hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). Whole-exome sequencing identified activating Ctnnb1 mutations and recurrent PP1 subunit alterations in p21+/Tert tumors, whereas p21+/TertCi tumors harbored activating HrasGln61Lys mutations associated with elevated C > A transversions. Both models exhibited chromosomal aberrations commonly observed in human HCC. Transcriptomic analyses revealed that β-catenin-activated tumors recapitulated gene expression signatures of human HCC, whereas MAPK-mutated tumors showed profiles consistent with MAPK/ERK pathway activation. All HCCs suppressed the gluconeogenic genes Fbp1 and AldoB, but diverged into two distinct groups based on their glycolytic and NRF2 target gene expression profiles. Spatial profiling further revealed reduced HNF4α-positive hepatocytes across tumors, independent of HNF4α transcription, and markedly diminished immune cell infiltration, particularly in β-catenin-activated tumors. Collectively, these findings uncover telomere-independent functions of Tert and identify molecular and metabolic features with potential relevance for predicting immunotherapy response.
global_hot_topics.title_en: TERT drives liver tumorigenesis beyond telomere elongation.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: TERT 驱动肝脏肿瘤的发生，超出了端粒延长的范围。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 我们生成了两种小鼠模型：p21+/Tert 和 p21+/TertCi，表达端粒酶逆转录酶 (Tert) 或 p21 启动子控制下的催化失活变体。到 18-20 月龄时，两种基因型的小鼠中约有 15% 出现肝脏肿瘤，其组织病理学特征类似于人类肝细胞癌 (HCC)。全外显子组测序发现 p21+/Tert 肿瘤中存在激活的 Ctnnb1 突变和反复发生的 PP1 亚基改变，而 p21+/TertCi 肿瘤则具有与 C > A 颠换升高相关的激活的 HrasGln61Lys 突变。两种模型均表现出人类肝癌中常见的染色体畸变。转录组分析显示，β-连环蛋白激活的肿瘤重现了人类 HCC 的基因表达特征，而 MAPK 突变的肿瘤则显示出与 MAPK/ERK 通路激活一致的特征。所有 HCC 均抑制糖异生基因 Fbp1 和 AldoB，但根据其糖酵解和 NRF2 靶基因表达谱分为两个不同的组。空间分析进一步揭示了肿瘤中 HNF4α 阳性肝细胞的减少，与 HNF4α 转录无关，并且免疫细胞浸润显着减少，特别是在 β-连环蛋白激活的肿瘤中。总的来说，这些发现揭示了 Tert 的独立于端粒的功能，并确定了与预测免疫治疗反应具有潜在相关性的分子和代谢特征。

核心发现：我们生成了两种小鼠模型：p21+/Tert 和 p21+/TertCi，表达端粒酶逆转录酶 (Tert) 或 p21 启动子控制下的催化失活变体。到 18-20 月龄时，两种基因型的小鼠中约有 15% 出现肝脏肿瘤，其组织病理学特征类似于人类肝细胞癌 (HCC)。全外显子组测序发现 p21+/Tert 肿瘤中存在激活的 Ctnnb1 突变和反复发生的 PP1 亚基改变，而 p21+/TertCi 肿瘤则具有与 C > A 颠换升高相关的激活的 HrasGln61Lys 突变。两种模型均表现出人类肝癌中常见的染色体畸变。转录组分析显示，β-连环蛋白激活的肿瘤重现了人类 HCC 的基因表达特征，而 MAPK 突变的肿瘤则显示出与 MAPK/ERK 通路激活一致的特征。所有 HCC 均抑制糖异生基因 Fbp1 和 AldoB，但根据其糖酵解和 NRF2 靶基因表达谱分为两个不同的组。空间分析进一步揭示了肿瘤中 HNF4α 阳性肝细胞的减少，与 HNF4α 转录无关，并且免疫细胞浸润显着减少，特别是在 β-连环蛋白激活的肿瘤中。总的来说，这些发现揭示了 Tert 的独立于端粒的功能，并确定了与预测免疫治疗反应具有潜在相关性的分子和代谢特征。

global_hot_topics.title: Bypassing pluripotency: The promise of direct differentiation from reaggregated micro-fat into multilineage organoids.
global_hot_topics.authors: Zhi Qi Lum; Koichiro Iohara; Eiji Kobayashi
global_hot_topics.abstract: Organoid technologies have emerged as powerful tools in regenerative medicine; however, current organoid technologies are predominantly based on pluripotent stem cell-derived systems, which poses challenges related to complexity, maturation, and clinical translation. In this commentary, we highlight a recent study by Huang et al. describing a tissue-level strategy for direct generation of functional multilineage organoids from human adult adipose tissue using reaggregated micro-fat (RMF). By preserving native tissue architecture and cellular heterogeneity, this approach enables the formation of mesoderm-, endoderm-, and ectoderm-derived organoids without genetic reprogramming or prolonged expansion culture. RMF-derived organoids demonstrate functional properties in vivo, including support of hematopoiesis and restoration of glycemic control in disease models. While further optimization and standardization will be required for clinical translation, this work provides a compelling alternative to conventional pluripotent stem cell-based paradigms and underscores the importance of tissue context in regenerative strategies. The study reframes adipose tissue as an integrated regenerative substrate and broadens the conceptual landscape of organoid generation toward more clinically accessible approaches.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Bypassing pluripotency: The promise of direct differentiation from reaggregated micro-fat into multilineage organoids.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 绕过多能性：从重新聚集的微脂肪直接分化为多谱系类器官的希望。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 类器官技术已成为再生医学领域的强大工具。然而，当前的类器官技术主要基于多能干细胞衍生系统，这带来了与复杂性、成熟度和临床转化相关的挑战。在这篇评论中，我们重点介绍了 Huang 等人最近的一项研究。描述了使用重新聚集的微脂肪（RMF）从成人脂肪组织直接生成功能性多谱系类器官的组织水平策略。通过保留天然组织结构和细胞异质性，该方法能够形成中胚层、内胚层和外胚层衍生的类器官，而无需基因重编程或长时间的扩增培养。 RMF 衍生的类器官在体内表现出功能特性，包括支持造血功能和恢复疾病模型中的血糖控制。虽然临床转化需要进一步优化和标准化，但这项工作为传统的基于多能干细胞的范例提供了令人信服的替代方案，并强调了组织环境在再生策略中的重要性。该研究将脂肪组织重新定义为一种整合的再生基质，并将类器官生成的概念范围拓宽到更易于临床使用的方法。

global_hot_topics.title: Exercise and fluoxetine in Alzheimer's disease: Molecular mechanisms of synergistic and antagonistic effects (Review).
global_hot_topics.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder characterized by amyloid‑β deposition, tau pathology, synaptic dysfunction, neuronal loss and neuroinflammation. Regular physical activity is a key non‑pharmacological strategy that can ameliorate cognitive impairment and multiple AD‑related pathological features across experimental models by improving mitochondrial function and quality control, strengthening antioxidant defenses, suppressing neuroinflammation and supporting synaptic plasticity. These effects are closely linked to enhanced neurotrophic signaling and cerebrovascular regulation, both of which contribute to resilience against AD‑associated cognitive decline. Fluoxetine, a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor widely prescribed for depression, has also shown potential benefits in AD models, including modulation of mitochondrial and redox homeostasis, inflammatory signaling and neuroplasticity. The present review integrates evidence on the convergent and divergent molecular targets of exercise and fluoxetine within core AD pathways, highlighting scenarios in which combined interventions may produce synergistic effects, as well as conditions that could lead to antagonistic effects. By mapping shared nodes and potential points of interference, the present review aims to clarify mechanistic hypotheses and inform the design of optimized, clinically translatable strategies that integrate lifestyle and pharmacological approaches for AD.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Exercise and fluoxetine in Alzheimer's disease: Molecular mechanisms of synergistic and antagonistic effects (Review).
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 运动和氟西汀治疗阿尔茨海默病：协同和拮抗作用的分子机制（综述）。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是一种进行性神经退行性疾病，其特征为淀粉样蛋白沉积、tau 蛋白病理、突触功​​能障碍、神经元丢失和神经炎症。定期体育活动是一种关键的非药物策略，可以通过改善线粒体功能和质量控制、加强抗氧化防御、抑制神经炎症和支持突触可塑性来改善实验模型中的认知障碍和多种 AD 相关病理特征。这些作用与神经营养信号传导和脑血管调节的增强密切相关，这两者都有助于抵抗 AD 相关的认知能力下降。氟西汀是一种广泛用于治疗抑郁症的选择性血清素再摄取抑制剂，它在 AD 模型中也显示出潜在的益处，包括调节线粒体和氧化还原稳态、炎症信号传导和神经可塑性。本综述整合了运动和氟西汀在 AD 核心途径中趋同和不同分子靶点的证据，强调了联合干预措施可能产生协同效应的情况，以及可能导致拮抗效应的情况。通过绘制共享节点和潜在干扰点，本综述旨在阐明机制假设，并为设计优化的、可临床转化的策略提供信息，这些策略将生活方式和药理学方法结合起来治疗 AD。

global_hot_topics.title: Clinical Outcomes After Failed Endoscopic Detorsion for Sigmoid Volvulus: A Single-Center Retrospective Cohort Study.
global_hot_topics.authors: Hidehiro Kamezaki; Arisa Kato; Nana Yamada; Terunao Iwanaga; Takafumi Sakuma; Koji Takahashi; Junichi Senoo; Sadahisa Ogasawara
global_hot_topics.abstract: OBJECTIVES: Endoscopic detorsion is the first-line treatment for sigmoid volvulus (SV); however, detorsion is not always successful. We evaluated clinical outcomes after failed endoscopic detorsion and assessed recurrence in patients who achieved clinical success after decompression. METHODS: This single-center retrospective cohort study included 47 patients with first-episode SV, of whom 43 underwent endoscopic management. Baseline characteristics and short-term outcomes were compared between successful and failed detorsion groups. Among patients with clinical success, the in-hospital course and 1-year cumulative recurrence were compared between the successful detorsion and successful decompression groups. Cumulative recurrence was evaluated using the Kaplan-Meier method. RESULTS: Successful detorsion was achieved in 21 of 43 patients (48.8%). Among 22 patients with failed detorsion, 17 achieved clinical success after decompression, whereas five had clinical failure, including four who underwent emergency surgery and one who died the following day. The overall clinical success rate was 88.4% (38/43). Failed detorsion was associated with lower room-air oxygen saturation and higher lactate levels. Clinical success was less frequent in the failed detorsion group (77.3% vs. 100%, p = 0.065), and hospital stay was longer (median 13 vs. 7 days, p = 0.071). Among patients with clinical success, time to resumption of oral intake was shorter in the successful detorsion group (median 1.5 vs. 3 days, p = 0.004), whereas the 1-year cumulative recurrence rate was numerically higher but not statistically significant (79.6 vs. 51.3%, log-rank p = 0.087). CONCLUSIONS: After assessing the need for emergency surgery, decompression alone may not always require immediate repeat detorsion in selected patients who improve clinically. TRIAL REGISTRATION: N/A.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Clinical Outcomes After Failed Endoscopic Detorsion for Sigmoid Volvulus: A Single-Center Retrospective Cohort Study.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 乙状结肠扭转内镜扭转失败后的临床结果：单中心回顾性队列研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：内镜扭转是乙状结肠扭转（SV）的一线治疗方法；然而，扭转并不总是成功。我们评估了内镜扭转失败后的临床结果，并评估了减压后临床成功的患者的复发情况。方法：这项单中心回顾性队列研究纳入了 47 例首发 SV 患者，其中 43 例接受了内镜治疗。比较成功和失败扭转组之间的基线特征和短期结果。在临床成功的患者中，比较成功扭转组和成功减压组的院内病程​​和1年累积复发情况。使用Kaplan-Meier方法评估累积复发率。结果：43 名患者中有 21 名患者成功扭转（48.8%）。 22例扭转失败的患者中，17例减压后获得临床成功，5例临床失败，其中4例接受紧急手术，1例第二天死亡。总体临床成功率为88.4%（38/43）。扭转失败与较低的室内空气氧饱和度和较高的乳酸水平有关。扭转失败组的临床成功率较低（77.3% vs. 100%，p = 0.065），住院时间较长（中位时间 13 天 vs. 7 天，p = 0.071）。在临床成功的患者中，成功扭转组恢复经口摄入的时间较短（中位 1.5 天 vs. 3 天，p = 0.004），而 1 年累积复发率在数值上较高，但不具有统计学意义（79.6% vs. 51.3%，对数秩 p = 0.087）。结论：在评估紧急手术的必要性后，对于临床改善的选定患者，单纯减压可能并不总是需要立即重复扭转。试用注册：不适用。

medical_news.title: A common vitamin could help fight one of the deadliest brain cancers
medical_news.abstract: A clinical trial is exploring whether high doses of vitamin B3 could give patients with glioblastoma a better chance against the aggressive brain cancer. Scientists found that niacin may help revive immune cells that tumors shut down, allowing them to attack cancer more effectively. Early results have been promising, with patients showing significantly better progression-free survival than expected.

medical_news.title: New vitamin B12 therapy shows promise against deadly brain cancer
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have identified a vitamin B12–based compound that can cross the blood-brain barrier and home in on glioblastoma tumors. In animal studies, the compound accumulated preferentially in tumor tissue and delivered sustained nitric oxide directly to cancer cells. It also worked synergistically with existing glioblastoma treatments, significantly enhancing their tumor-fighting effects.
medical_news.title_en: New vitamin B12 therapy shows promise against deadly brain cancer

medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员发现了一种基于维生素 B12 的化合物，可以穿过血脑屏障并瞄准胶质母细胞瘤。在动物研究中，该化合物优先在肿瘤组织中积累，并将持续的一氧化氮直接输送到癌细胞。它还与现有的胶质母细胞瘤治疗协同作用，显着增强其抗肿瘤效果。

medical_news.title: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.abstract: Creatine is best known as a muscle-building supplement, but scientists are now investigating whether it could also help treat depression by boosting the brain's energy supply. A new review examined five randomized clinical trials involving 238 participants and found mixed results. Two studies, both involving women with major depressive disorder, reported that adding creatine to standard treatment improved symptoms, while three others found no meaningful benefit.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家称肌酸可能有助于对抗抑郁症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 肌酸最著名的是一种肌肉增强补充剂，但科学家们现在正在研究它是否也可以通过增加大脑的能量供应来帮助治疗抑郁症。一项新的综述审查了 5 项涉及 238 名参与者的随机临床试验，发现结果好坏参半。两项研究均涉及患有重度抑郁症的女性，报告称在标准治疗中添加肌酸可以改善症状，而其他三项研究则没有发现任何有意义的益处。

medical_news.title: Melanoma's secret to cheating death has finally been revealed
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have solved a long-standing mystery by discovering the missing genetic ingredient that helps melanoma cells become effectively immortal. The breakthrough could open the door to new treatments aimed at disrupting one of cancer's most important survival strategies.

medical_news.title: This common vitamin deficiency can mimic normal aging
medical_news.abstract: Vitamin B12 is needed in microscopic amounts, but a shortage can have major effects on health and energy. The vitamin was first linked to a lifesaving liver treatment for pernicious anemia nearly 100 years ago. Today, researchers are finding that B12 may also help keep cellular powerhouses called mitochondria functioning properly. This could explain why some people experience fatigue and brain fog even before traditional signs of deficiency show up.
medical_news.title_en: This common vitamin deficiency can mimic normal aging

medical_news.title: Brain activity under anesthesia challenges what we know about consciousness
medical_news.abstract: The unconscious brain appears to be far more capable than scientists once believed. Researchers found that patients under general anesthesia could still process language at a sophisticated level, distinguishing nouns, verbs, and adjectives while listening to stories. Even more remarkably, neural activity showed signs of predicting upcoming words before they were heard. The results challenge traditional ideas about consciousness and hint at new possibilities for brain-computer interfaces.

medical_news.title: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's kills brain cells
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have identified a previously overlooked mechanism of brain cell death that appears to play a major role in Alzheimer's disease and frontotemporal dementia. The finding could lead to new treatments aimed at slowing neuron loss by interrupting the process before cells are destroyed.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's kills brain cells

medical_news.title: A hidden weakness in deadly cancers could lead to powerful new treatments
medical_news.abstract: A UCLA study has identified a hidden Achilles' heel in aggressive small cell cancers that have resisted new treatments for decades. Scientists found that tumors lacking the RB gene become critically dependent on the protein E2F3 for survival. Blocking E2F3 shut down tumor growth in laboratory models, and existing FDA-approved drugs may be able to exploit this vulnerability. The discovery could pave the way for faster development of more effective therapies.
medical_news.title_en: A hidden weakness in deadly cancers could lead to powerful new treatments
medical_news.title_cn: 致命癌症的隐藏弱点可能会带来强大的新疗法
medical_news.abstract_cn: 加州大学洛杉矶分校的一项研究发现了侵袭性小细胞癌的一个隐藏的致命弱点，这些癌症几十年来一直抵制新疗法。科学家发现，缺乏 RB 基因的肿瘤的生存变得严重依赖于蛋白质 E2F3。阻断 E2F3 可以阻止实验室模型中的肿瘤生长，而 FDA 批准的现有药物可能能够利用这一漏洞。这一发现可能为更快开发更有效的疗法铺平道路。

medical_news.title: The real cause of a common stroke may have been missed for decades
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have discovered that a common type of stroke may have a very different cause than doctors once thought. Instead of fatty plaque clogging arteries, the strongest link was found with enlarged and damaged blood vessels deep within the brain. The finding helps explain why standard treatments like aspirin are often less effective and is driving the search for new therapies that target the brain’s tiny blood vessels directly.
medical_news.title_en: The real cause of a common stroke may have been missed for decades
medical_news.title_cn: 常见中风的真正原因可能几十年来一直被忽视
medical_news.abstract_cn: 科学家发现，一种常见的中风类型可能有与医生曾经认为的非常不同的原因。发现最强的联系不是脂肪斑块堵塞动脉，而是大脑深处扩大和受损的血管。这一发现有助于解释为什么阿司匹林等标准治疗通常效果较差，并正在推动寻找直接针对大脑微小血管的新疗法。

medical_news.title: Scientists discover ancient brain cells that help block distractions
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have discovered a tiny group of neurons in an ancient brain region that acts like a built-in focus filter, helping the brain ignore distractions and zero in on what matters most. When researchers temporarily switched off these neurons in mice, the animals became unusually distractible—similar to what is seen in ADHD—but regained normal focus as soon as the neurons were reactivated.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists discover ancient brain cells that help block distractions
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家发现古老的脑细胞有助于阻止干扰
medical_news.abstract_cn: 科学家们在古代大脑区域中发现了一小群神经元，其作用就像内置的焦点过滤器，帮助大脑忽略干扰并将最重要的事情归零。当研究人员暂时关闭小鼠的这些神经元时，这些动物变得异常分心（类似于多动症），但一旦神经元重新激活，它们就会恢复正常注意力。
